linkedin_profile.headline: Director of Sales | Sales, Hotels, Hospitality Industry
linkedin_profile.about:
I've spent several years at Clermont Hotel Group, building my expertise in sales within the hospitality industry. Along the way, I've led teams to hit ambitious targets and drive revenue growth, always keeping Clermont's commitment to excellence at the forefront. My approach combines innovative sales strategies with a focus on customer satisfaction, allowing me to play to my strengths in both sales and hospitality while fostering strong client relationships and delivering exceptional service. As Director of Sales, I've taken on the challenge of elevating sales operations across our iconic properties—The Clermont Victoria, The Clermont Charing Cross, and The Royal Horseguards. In this role, I’m passionate about developing my team, identifying future talent, and helping them grow, all while crafting effective sales initiatives, building key partnerships, and guiding our sales force to capture new market opportunities. My goal is to ensure the Clermont brand continues to stand out for its excellence in the competitive hospitality landscape.

Total Experience: 20 years and 10 months

linkedin_profile.about: Experienced Group and Event Sales Executive with a demonstrated history of working in the hospitality industry. experience.title: Revenue Co-Ordinator
experience.description: I monitored and administered all bookings made at the hotel as the sole reservationist on site. I also liaised with all group bookings including VIPs such as WWE, bands and television personalities to ensure smooth operational process. This role required cross-departmental teamwork with Front Office, Meetings & Events and Food & Beverage. As part of this, I attended daily and weekly meetings with all heads of department.

experience.title: Group Sales Administrator
experience.description: Starting at the Thistle Marble Arch, and then based in the Central Reservations Office after centralising in early 2009. Managing Group booking for numerous properties including The Cumberland and Marble Arch. From late 2010, based as an on site employee of The Tower Hotel overseeing and raising group business. Dealing with various complex hotel group bookings simultaneously, as well as liaising with customers in person, by telephone and by email, I covered both domestic and overseas clients and coordinated high profile bookings worth in excess of £100,000. Much of my role required engaging with customers both in the leisure and corporate markets by providing specific product knowledge and booking advice to ensure their expectations were met. As well as administration, I took new sales enquiries over the phone, by email and in person to convert future business and build relationships with clients. Other tasks included daily traces and monthly forecasts to convert provisional bookings, which show my ability to prioritise and organise tasks to complete within or ahead of any deadlines.

experience.title: Value Centre Relationship Manager
experience.description: During my time in this role, as well as building the hotel's client base for group bookings by bringing my experience from past roles, I was able to expand my knowledge by being involved in individual reservations, revenue, social media, corporate accounts, RFPs, and site visits and familiarisation trips to the hotel. I attended the daily and weekly hotel meetings, as well as the weekly strategy meeting to form the hotel's objectives for future business and opportunities for growth.

experience.title: Meetings And Events Sales Executive
experience.description: My main roles have been to take and quote new queries, follow up with prospective and repeat customers, contracting and also the administration leading up to the event. This requires a strong focus on relationship building and customer service. This period has helped me to understand a new segment a lot clearer in terms of revenue, sales and administration. I now have a more rounded knowledge of the hospitality industry and have improved many of my skills. In my time in this department, we have shown consistent year on year growth in revenue.

linkedin_profile.about:
Leading with a strategic vision at Clermont Hotel Group, my focus centers on operational excellence and delivering outstanding guest experiences. Enhancing the capital value of properties and driving additional revenue streams through asset enhancement strategies is at the core of my professional ethos. Our team's collaborative efforts led to the successful £240K refurbishment at Thistle Heathrow, which not only elevated customer satisfaction but also contributed to a significant rise in revenue. My tenure at Lamington Group showcases my competency in multisite operations and a commitment to brand growth, where I steered the pre-opening of new sites and fostered a culture of excellence. At the heart of our operations lies a dedication to efficiency, customer experience optimization, and the empowerment of teams that has defined our journey towards setting industry benchmarks.
